text.title: Gemini API Integration — Core Rules
text.summary: Testable rules every application of `gemini-api` must enforce. Verifiable at review time; failures gate the artifact.

rule.statement: Wrap every API call in exponential backoff (5s → 60s capped); honour 429 Retry-After.
rule.rationale: Gemini API rate limits are per-project-per-model; tight retries trigger penalty backoff.

rule.statement: Use response_mime_type='application/json' + response_schema for any structured output.
rule.rationale: Free-form output requires brittle parsing; structured mode is enforced by the model.

rule.statement: Enable context caching when system prompt + reference docs >1024 tokens and reused ≥5x.
rule.rationale: Cache cuts cost ~75% on cached tokens; break-even is roughly 5 reuses.

rule.statement: Set safety_settings explicitly per harm category; never rely on defaults.
rule.rationale: Defaults change across model versions; explicit settings are auditable.

rule.statement: Pin model version (gemini-3-pro-001), never use floating 'latest' tag.
rule.rationale: Floating tags introduce silent quality drift on model upgrade.

rule.statement: Live API sessions are stateful + expensive; cap session length + concurrent count.
rule.rationale: Unbounded Live sessions consume per-project resources; one rogue tab can saturate quota.
